docs.title: Concord risk assessment process
docs.review_cadence: Quarterly review of register entries; annual review of methodology itself.
docs.rating_scale: 5-point scale (low/medium/high/critical/catastrophic) × likelihood (rare/unlikely/possible/likely/almost-certain); product determines treatment priority.
docs.scope: All production systems, AI models, third-party data processors, and HR-touching systems.
